the-apothecarys-basket.name: the-apothecarys-basket
the-apothecarys-basket.questStatement: Brenna Halt, a forager and small-trapper, has prepared a sealed basket of perishable foraged goods for an apothecary in a nearby village, but her usual courier is laid up sick and the cuttings will lose their potency by sundown.
the-apothecarys-basket.mainObjective: Carry Brenna's basket of foraged herbs and wild hare to the apothecary at Valhelde
the-apothecarys-basket.completionCondition: The player delivers the sealed basket to the apothecary at Valhelde and returns with the apothecary's receipt
the-apothecarys-basket.questDesignBrief: A simple, honest first-day task for a new mercenary. Brenna is a forager and small-trapper working the wooded margins north of Red Harvest. Her sealed basket contains fresh-cut wild herbs—witch-hazel cuttings, fenroot, wormwood, dried mushrooms—and a brace of trapped hare tucked under damp moss. The apothecary at Valhelde, a half-day's walk northwest along the river road, pays a flat modest fee on receipt. Brenna adds a small bonus when the player returns with the chit. No danger, no wrinkle—pure straightforward work. Cargo is foraged and hunted goods only.

the-road-marker-bundle.name: the-road-marker-bundle
the-road-marker-bundle.questStatement: Old Mirek, a traveller staying at Red Harvest, asks the player to retrieve a small wrapped bundle he left at a roadside marker, insisting the errand is innocent but offering little explanation.
the-road-marker-bundle.mainObjective: Fetch the bundle Old Mirek left at the old marker post and bring it back to him
the-road-marker-bundle.completionCondition: The player retrieves the bundle from the roadside marker and returns it to Old Mirek at the inn
the-road-marker-bundle.questDesignBrief: A fetch quest with a subtle wrinkle: Mirek is evasive about why the bundle is there, what is inside, or why he cannot fetch it himself. The wrinkle is LOW-DRAMA — nothing illegal or dangerous, no betrayal. The player can accept the job, ask questions, or shrug and walk away. The actual contents are modest and slightly embarrassing or sentimental: old gambling tokens, a love-letter cache, a pressed flower, a service-medal he didn't want his companion to see, or similar. Reward is a handful of coins and Mirek's quiet thanks.

the-cellar-vermin.name: the-cellar-vermin
the-cellar-vermin.questStatement: Goran, innkeeper at Red Harvest, has a small infestation of Gristlemaws in his cellar and needs them cleared out.
the-cellar-vermin.mainObjective: Clear the Gristlemaws from Goran's cellar
the-cellar-vermin.completionCondition: The player kills or drives out all the Gristlemaws in the cellar and reports success to Goran
the-cellar-vermin.questDesignBrief: A kill quest for first-day work. Goran operates one of Red Harvest's inns and has discovered three to five knee-high Gristlemaws nesting in his cellar — scaly grey beasts with oversized jaws, dangerous in a confined space but low-tier vermin. The cellar is damp, dark, and narrow, creating a claustrophobic fight. Reward is bed and board for a night plus a handful of coins.

the-avenor-run.name: the-avenor-run
the-avenor-run.questStatement: Saska Vorin, a small-trader caravaneer, needs armed escort for a half-day journey from Red Harvest to a neighboring Avenor village. She has hired a Hofnar wagon-driver to haul the cargo, but the road poses risks.
the-avenor-run.mainObjective: Escort Saska Vorin and her Hofnar driver's wagon to High-Garden Hamlet
the-avenor-run.completionCondition: The player arrives at High-Garden Hamlet with Saska Vorin, the Hofnar driver, and the wagon intact
the-avenor-run.questDesignBrief: A guard quest appropriate for starter work. Saska contracts a Hofnar wagon-driver and team for each route. The convoy—Saska, the Hofnar driver, and the laden wagon—departs Red Harvest at dawn bound for High-Garden Hamlet, a half-day's road mostly safe but with tense possibility of wolf packs or highway ambush. The threat is a possibility, not a guarantee; this is a watchful walk, not a guaranteed battle. The player guards all three: merchant, driver, and cargo. Saska pays a flat modest fee on arrival. The road is known, the destination a small agricultural village east of Red Harvest.
